contradiction_rules.label: Required versus not-required guidance
contradiction_rules.message_template: Retrieved evidence contains contradictory guidance about {aspect}.
contradiction_rules.suggested_action: Route this evidence set to human review and prefer the current authoritative source version before applying guidance.

contradiction_rules.label: Allowed versus prohibited guidance
contradiction_rules.message_template: Retrieved evidence contains conflicting allow/block guidance about {aspect}.
contradiction_rules.suggested_action: Keep the action review-gated and resolve the policy conflict before export or external-provider handoff.

deprecated_mapping.message_template: Terminology or standard mapping evidence comes from a deprecated, blocked, failed, or review-required source.
deprecated_mapping.suggested_action: Refresh the source, verify the mapping against the current official release, and keep downstream coding review-gated.

version_mismatch.message_template: Retrieved standard guidance for {group_key} spans multiple source versions: {versions}.
version_mismatch.suggested_action: Prefer the configured current source version, refresh stale chunks, or split the answer by source version.

unit_conflict.message_template: Retrieved evidence links {concept} to multiple unit candidates: {units}.
unit_conflict.suggested_action: Normalize units with an approved UCUM conversion path before merging or comparing values.
